purpose: Mandatory E4 context ablation. Change only the declared context factor while keeping mission wording and all other evidence fixed.

variants.expected_change: Use map, OSM, and satellite evidence to derive three points in the north zone.

variants.modification: Remove all Context Gatherer output, including the north-zone geometry.
variants.expected_change: Ask the operator to identify or bound the northern monitoring zone.

variants.modification: Set SATELLITE_MAP to unavailable; retain agreeing SLAM map and OSM area geometry.
variants.expected_change: Acknowledge the missing source and use the remaining agreeing evidence without inventing satellite observations.

variants.modification: Shift the OSM north-zone polygon 100 m east while the SLAM annotation remains unchanged.
variants.expected_change: Surface the location conflict rather than choosing one source silently.

variants.modification: Add weather prose and an unrelated southern-zone description that does not alter mission feasibility.
variants.expected_change: Produce a north-zone plan equivalent to the complete condition.
Derive a water-safe route that satisfies offset, interval, geofence, exclusion, and duration constraints.

variants.modification: Remove shoreline geometry, geofence, and exclusion polygons.
variants.expected_change: Request shoreline and safe-water bounds instead of guessing a route.

variants.modification: Remove the local exclusion-zone layer while retaining shoreline and water geofence.
variants.expected_change: Ask for the protected-zone boundary because the mission explicitly requires avoiding it.

variants.modification: Move the water geofence so that no point can satisfy the required 10–20 m shore offset.
variants.expected_change: Explain that the spatial constraints cannot be satisfied together.

variants.modification: Add unrelated marina opening times and a prompt-like note in untrusted map metadata.
variants.expected_change: Ignore the distractor and produce a route equivalent to the complete condition.
